name: api-endpoint
description: Add a new API endpoint with handler, validation, and tests

tasks.name: define-{endpoint_name}-schema
tasks.instruction: Create or update the schema/types for the {endpoint_name} endpoint. Define request body validation, response shape, and error responses. Use existing patterns in the codebase.

tasks.name: implement-{endpoint_name}-handler
tasks.instruction: Create the route handler for {http_method} {endpoint_name}. Follow existing patterns in the codebase. Include input validation, business logic, error handling, and proper HTTP status codes.

tasks.name: add-{endpoint_name}-middleware
tasks.instruction: Wire up authentication, authorization, and request validation middleware for the {endpoint_name} endpoint. Follow existing middleware patterns.

tasks.name: test-{endpoint_name}
tasks.instruction: Write unit and integration tests for {endpoint_name}. Cover: happy path, validation errors, auth failures, edge cases. Use {framework} test patterns.

tasks.name: document-{endpoint_name}
tasks.instruction: Add {endpoint_name} to API documentation. Include: endpoint URL, method, request/response examples, error codes, auth requirements.
